allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix YouTube stream extraction with mobile client fallbacks

Enable android/ios player client fallbacks that bypass signature challenges.
Add mpv alternative player with built-in yt-dlp support for better reliability.
Include diagnostic script and comprehensive troubleshooting documentation.

Changes:
- Enable android/ios client extraction attempts \(ytdlp.go\)
- Add mpv player implementation \(mpv_player.go\)
- Add mpv-based job runner \(app_mpv.go\)
- Install mpv in Docker container \(Dockerfile\)
- Add diagnostic script \(diagnose.sh\)
- Add troubleshooting guides \(FIXES_APPLIED.md, ALTERNATIVE_APPROACHES.md\)

Fixes stream extraction failures caused by YouTube signature verification.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
